subcodes.first_line: O thou who art bewildered by the Beauty of the All-Merciful! Upon thee be the Glory of God. The lamp of the love of God is brightly lit, and the hearts of the free through His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حیران جمال رحمن علیک بهاء الله سراج محبت الله روشن است و قلوب احرار از فضل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual transformation, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
